scene: Byte waking up in the morning, gangly teen form stretching after peaceful sleep.

subjects.description: Byte, a gangly teen blue blob, happily stretching with big expressive eyes wide open.
Desk with oversized silver laptop, Chicago skyline window, trophy shelf above with one gold trophy and one green plant.

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: bright, warm morning light streaming through the window
background: room with desk, oversized laptop, and trophy shelf
